title: Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee Wireless Communication Policy
summary: This policy establishes the security and configuration standards that all wireless infrastructure devices must meet to connect to Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee networks, and defines enforcement consequences for non-compliance.
notes: 1) There is a date discrepancy in the document: the header on page 1 reads '10/04/2021' while the footers on pages 2 and 3 read '01/30/2020'. It is unclear which date reflects the true effective date; 10/04/2021 was used as the effective date and 01/30/2020 as the last review date, but a human reviewer should confirm. 2) No formal next-review date or review cadence is stated. 3) No explicit records-retention period applies to the policy document itself; under the diocesan retention schedule, governing policy documents are generally retained permanently, but this is not stated in the document. 4) The diocese taxonomy does not include an 'IT' classification; IT is the closest schema-defined category. The suggested chapter address (7.1.1) is a best-guess mapping under an Administrative/IT governance axis and should be confirmed against the actual diocesan policy manual numbering. 5) The revision history shows the policy originated at least as early as May 5, 2011, indicating a long amendment history that a reviewer may wish to audit for completeness.
